name: visual-hive
description: Deterministic-first visual QA and testing orchestration for web projects.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @visual-hive/core && npm run build -w @visual-hive/control-plane && npm run build -w @visual-hive/github-adapter && npm run build -w @visual-hive/llm-adapter && npm run build -w @visual-hive/playwright-adapter && npm run build -w @visual-hive/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/core && npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/control-plane && npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/github-adapter && npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/llm-adapter && npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/playwright-adapter && npm run typecheck -w @visual-hive/cli && npm run typecheck -w demo-react-app
scripts.demo:all: npm run demo:build && npm run demo:doctor && npm run demo:recommend && npm run demo:plan && npm run demo:run && npm run demo:baselines && npm run demo:mutate && npm run demo:coverage && npm run demo:improve && npm run demo:targets && npm run demo:contracts && npm run demo:flows && npm run demo:schedules && npm run demo:workflows && npm run demo:providers && npm run demo:triage && npm run demo:llm && npm run demo:report && npm run demo:risk && npm run demo:security && npm run demo:costs && npm run demo:readiness && npm run demo:history && npm run demo:artifacts
scripts.demo:ci: npm run demo:build && npm run demo:doctor && npm run demo:recommend && npm run demo:plan && npm run demo:run && node packages/cli/dist/index.js run --config examples/demo-react-app/visual-hive.config.yaml --skip-install --skip-build --ci && npm run demo:baselines && npm run demo:coverage && npm run demo:improve && npm run demo:targets && npm run demo:contracts && npm run demo:flows && npm run demo:schedules && npm run demo:workflows && npm run demo:providers && npm run demo:triage && npm run demo:llm && npm run demo:report && npm run demo:risk && npm run demo:security && npm run demo:costs && npm run demo:readiness && npm run demo:history && npm run demo:artifacts
